'''Naga Sadow's tomb''' was built by the [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] of the ancient [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] and was the actual [[Burial/Legends|resting place]] of [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow's]] physical remains.

==History==
Prior to the [[Great Galactic War]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Barel Ovair]], and his apprentice, [[Eison Gynt]] were exploring the ancient Sith [[Planet/Legends|worlds]], including [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] and fourth [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]]. While undertaking their [[Mission to Yavin 4|mission]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were attacked by the descendants of Naga Sadow's [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. They were overwhelmed and driven into the depths of Sadow's [[Burial/Legends|tomb]]. There they experienced the heavy presence of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]. Ovair abandoned Gynt in the tomb and returned to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], reporting that his apprentice was [[Death/Legends|dead]]. In reality, Gynt was alive and had been possessed by the spirit of [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]]. Several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, while still in the thrall of the ancient [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], he found his way back to the galactic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] and [[Duel on Coruscant (Inter–Sith Wars Period)|attacked]] his former master. In full view of many witnesses, Gynt was slain by Ovair, who was lauded by the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] for his victory over the dark side. Little did the Council know, Ovair was in truth a Sith who served the [[Tenebrae|Sith Emperor]] and had been tasked with infiltrating the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and eliminating the spirits of ancient Sith Lords.<ref name="Timeline 7" />
